meta.title: Nina Shea on the Attacks of Christians in the Middle East for Fox
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Religious Freedom Nina Shea joined Fox and Friends on January 14 to discuss the persecution of Christians that has been occurring in the Middle East.
